arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold keeping his word but Liverpool fear could soon be realised
arts.sum: The clock continues to tick on Trent Alexander-Arnold's Liverpool contract which runs out next summer

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds unlikely to move for £70m-rated Marc Guehi
arts.sum: Liverpool are not expected to move for £70m-rated Crystal Palace centre-back Marc Guehi

arts.ttl: Arne Slot training change could prove popular after Liverpool players asked Jurgen Klopp for switch
arts.sum: The Dutchman has made an excellent start to life at Anfield and one tweak in particular could make the difference this weekend

arts.ttl: Jordan Henderson makes surprise return to Liverpool and receives a warm welcome from his former team-mates just over a year after his controversial Saudi Arabia move
arts.sum: Former Liverpool captain Jordan Henderson made a surprise appearance at the Reds' AXA Training Centre on Friday.

arts.ttl: ‘Very close’: Virgil van Dijk says £4m player is his best friend at Liverpool now
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk is one of the most popular figures in the Liverpool dressing room. As the club captain, it’s a pre-requisite that Van Dijk...

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner makes Arne Slot claim as injury blow revealed before Liverpool clash
arts.athr: liverpool.news@trinitymirror.com (By Jim van Wijk, PA, Amie Wilson)
arts.sum: Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner has been speaking about the challenge of facing Liverpool on Saturday, and the impact of Arne Slot at Anfield

arts.ttl: ‘Dangerous’: John Barnes says £20m Crystal Palace player could cause Liverpool problems
arts.sum: Crystal Palace face Liverpool this weekend, and they head into this game as serious underdogs. Indeed, Palace haven’t had the best of starts this season,...

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs. Liverpool: Premier League leaders need to be at their "absolute best" to beat Eagles
arts.sum: Premier League leaders Liverpool are warned that they will need to be at their "absolute best" to beat winless relegation zone-dwellers Crystal Palace on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot can unleash potent Liverpool weapon with one of Jurgen Klopp's greatest gifts
arts.sum: Liverpool's substitutes were a potent weapon under Jurgen Klopp and Arne Slot will hope his squad can replicate that success this term

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace boss makes admission over Adam Wharton’s England U21 involvement
arts.sum: Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner expects Adam Wharton to withdraw from England U21 duty. The midfielder has been carrying a groin issue this season but was named in the England U21 squad for their final European Championship qualifiers against Ukraine and Azerbaijan.
